The '''Mere demolition boats''' were specially modified boats used by the [[Mere Resistance]] in their attack on the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Maramere]] sensor station.

Loaded with explosives, and commandeered by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orsai]] and [[Sol Sixxa]], they were armed with a heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret and two lighter turrets, and were successful in their mission to destroy the sensor station, where both Orsai and Sol Sixxa used their underwater [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] to safely escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
